accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate War Powers context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; references to statutes and dates match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of US forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes invocation of War Powers Resolution and related expedited-procedure statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs for defense, intelligence, and assistance to partners.

effective_dates.why: Correctly references the February 28, 2026 cutoff date used in the bill's exceptions.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the directive to remove forces and all key exceptions.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, factual description with no editorializing.

concise.why: Tight summary without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: War Powers Resolution and Iran correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The February 28, 2026 date is stated correctly.
